description: CompositionRound neck yellow t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print and stitch detailing in contrast colour along the shoulders, sleeve ends and hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soaking Remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shade.Warm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryBring out the surfer and sense of adventure of your little man with this t-shirt from disney.
